params.value: SELECT User_ID_18__c, Username, Name, Manager_Reports__c, GTM_Motion_User__c, Profile_ID__c FROM User WHERE IsActive = true AND (Manager_Reports__c LIKE '%Swetlana Gossen%' OR Manager_Reports__c LIKE '%Nathalie Jansen%' OR Manager_Reports__c LIKE '%Nils Klems%' OR Manager_Reports__c LIKE '%Alina Schnor%' OR Manager_Reports__c LIKE '%Sandra Siemoneit%' OR Manager_Reports__c LIKE '%Monika Urbanaviciute%') AND GTM_Motion_User__c = 'Inside Sales'
